speaker: speaker1
text: Good afternoon . Can I help you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I need some remedies for an upset stomach .

speaker: speaker1
text: Are you also suffering from pain and fever ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , and I also have the runs

speaker: speaker1
text: I'll give you some tablets that should make you feel better . One moment , please . Here you are . Take these tablets three times a day swallow them with water .

speaker: speaker2
text: How long should I continue taking them ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Take them for two days.If your symptoms persist for more than two days , you should see a doctor Also , be sure to drink plenty of water to prevent dehydration .
